hook: ChatGPT keeps explaining things to you like you've never heard of Google.
caption:
ChatGPT keeps explaining things to you like you've never heard of Google.

You asked for help writing a pitch deck.

It started with: "A pitch deck is a presentation used by entrepreneurs to..."

You've been in startups for 8 years.

This is the AI equivalent of someone handing you a fork and going "so this is how you hold it."

The problem isn't the AI. The problem is the AI has zero context about who's on the other end of the keyboard.

It doesn't know you're a fast processor who wants the answer first, reasoning second.

It doesn't know you hate filler sentences like they owe you money.

It doesn't know you already did the research — you just need help structuring it.

So it defaults to the average person. Which is no one you know.

That's the gap bootfile.ai was built to close.

Your BootFile is a profile that tells AI exactly how you think — your reasoning style, your communication preferences, your blind spots, your defaults under pressure.

You paste it into any session. The AI recalibrates. Immediately.

No more remedial explanations.

No more responses that feel written for a stranger.

Just AI that actually talks to *you*.

Link in bio to build yours.
